$comment: Sequential execution manifest for the post-smoke hardening epic (#325). pipeline-advance.yml reads this. kick: 'mention' posts @codex on the issue when its predecessor's PR merges; 'pause' notifies the repo owner on the epic and stops; 'none' is a manually-managed step. automerge: true requests the safe auto-merge labels on the closing PR (the deterministic path evaluator in scripts/agent/check-safe-automerge.mjs remains the actual gate). Prior program (epic #243) completed through B6; its two remaining steps (#240 human-gated calendar spike, #241 production smoke) are human-managed outside this manifest — the 2026-07-03 smoke already ran and produced KNOWN_ISSUES rows 11-14, which this epic addresses.

pipeline.note: H1 line-ending normalization + planning-loader footgun comment; touches repo root, human merge
H2 truthful /health persisted-mode probes (KNOWN_ISSUES row 13); T2 health behavior, human merge
H3 sync failure classification (loads vs saves vs missing capability); T2 data layer, human merge
H4 placement feedback + optimistic-echo dedup (KNOWN_ISSUES row 12); T2 data layer + UX, human merge
